title: acalypha tenuicauda
intro: Acalypha tenuicauda, also known as Acalypha, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha tenuicauda include its potential to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Acalypha tenuicauda can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat various ailments.
